name: OpenWiki Docs Mention
prompt: A GitHub issue or pull request comment mentioned OpenWiki. Read the event payload and surrounding issue or PR context. If the comment asks to initialize docs, run /openwiki-docs:init. Otherwise run /openwiki-docs:update with any requested focus from the comment. Commit only openwiki/** plus top-level AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md changes. Open a PR for issue-triggered work, or push to the PR branch when safe and permitted. Leave a concise comment with what changed or why no change was needed.
